content.text:
Course:
Introduction to Marketing (IMark) — Semester 4, Unit UT4, Credits: 2, Coeff: 1
Course Objectives
The Introduction to Marketing course is related to information technology and allows students to become familiar with the basic principles and concepts of marketing, as well as to understand the main areas where marketing practices are applied.
Course Content
The nature of marketing and the evolution of its philosophy
Study and analysis of the marketing environment
Study of consumer behavior
The nature of the market and the process of targeting it
Marketing information systems
The marketing mix (Product strategy, Pricing strategy, Distribution strategy, Promotion strategy, etc.)
Modern marketing practices
Teaching Mode
Hybrid (20% face to face and 80% online)
Assessment Mode
Final Exam (100%)
